documents.description:
## What it does

BANK OF AI LLM API gives agents, scripts, and applications paid access to first-party large-language-model inference through x402. It supports model discovery, OpenAI-compatible chat completions, and Claude-compatible messages without exposing an upstream BANK OF AI API key to the caller.

## Best for

- AI agents that need on-demand reasoning, summarization, extraction, classification, or content generation.
- Developer tools and scripts that want to call LLMs from the command line with per-request x402 payment.
- Apps that already speak OpenAI Chat Completions or Anthropic Messages style payloads.
- Workflows that need stablecoin payment on BSC Testnet or TRON Nile before forwarding to the upstream model API.

## Quick start

Install the payment client:

```bash
pip install bankofai-x402-cli==0.6.1b4
x402-cli --version
```

List models on BSC Testnet:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-bsc/v1/models' \
  --network eip155:97 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit
```

List models on TRON Nile:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-tron-nile/v1/models' \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree
```

For chat generation, call `/v1/chat/completions`; for Claude-style clients, call `/v1/messages`.

endpoints.description: Return the BANK OF AI models currently exposed by the gateway, including identifiers that can be used in subsequent generation requests.
endpoints.title: List Models

endpoints.description: Create an OpenAI-compatible chat completion from a messages array, model ID, and generation options.
endpoints.title: Chat Completions

endpoints.description: Create a Claude-compatible response using an Anthropic-style messages payload.
endpoints.title: Messages

documents.subtitle: OpenAI-compatible LLM inference
documents.title: BANK OF AI LLM API
documents.use_case: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs on-demand LLM inference with x402 payment. Start with /v1/models to choose a model, then call /v1/chat/completions for OpenAI-style requests or /v1/messages for Claude-style message payloads.
